hero.description: Unify your brokerage operations, automate compliance, and scale effortlessly with our serverless enterprise platform designed for the modern financial ecosystem.

features.sectionDescription: Omnigize seamlessly unifies multiple powerful modules into a single operating system. Manage clients, properties, workflows, and support without switching tabs.

crm.title: Omni-Channel CRM
crm.description: Centralize Contacts, Leads, and Deals. Track conversions, metadata, and communication history across multiple channels.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Engine
realEstate.description: Built-in property management. Track statuses, locations, pricing, and associate properties directly with sales deals.

pipelines.title: Dynamic Pipelines
pipelines.description: Create custom sales stages, conditional transitions, and drag-and-drop visual boards tailored to any business entity.

automation.title: Flow Automation
automation.description: Trigger automated actions, webhooks, and complex Maker/Checker approval workflows based on rigorous predefined rules.

helpdesk.title: Support Helpdesk
helpdesk.description: Integrated omnichannel ticketing. Auto-assign agents, track resolutions, and monitor SLA performance priorities.

documents.title: Digital Documents
documents.description: Manage contracts directly attached to Deals. Track statuses from Draft to Pending Approval to fully Signed.

cta.title: Ready to unify your operations?
cta.description: Join modern enterprises across the MENA region accelerating their growth with Omnigize.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace
auth.signupSubtitle: Start your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
